title: Faithfull Tile Cutter 400mm – Manual Dual Rail Tile Cutter for Wall, Floor & Quarry Tiles up to 400mm Square, 280mm Diagonal & 10mm thick
features: Straight & Angled Cutting Capacity– Suitable for wall, floor and quarry tiles up to 400mm square, 280mm diagonal and 10mm thick. The graduated angle guide allows quick, accurate angled cuts, offering versatility to suit a range of small tiling projects.

Durable Tungsten Carbide Wheel – Strong cutting wheel ensures clean, precise scoring and long-lasting performance. Score repeatedly rather than forcing the snap to reduce the risk of handle strain and tile breakage.

Smooth Dual Rail Action & Stable Non-Slip Base – Solid chromed dual rails with a ball bearing sliding handle deliver consistent, smooth scoring for accurate, professional results, while rubber feet and bump stops provide secure contact on surfaces and absorb impact for greater control and safety during use.

Ensure Cutter is Suited to Your Tile & Project - Always ensure this cutter is suited to your tile size, thickness and application. Larger Faithfull models are available if greater capacity is required. This model is not designed for use on porcelain tiles. For harder materials, a specialist cutter is recommended.

Faithfull 5 Year Manufacturers Guarantee – For best results, score with even forward pressure, then snap by ensuring the wheel is clear of the tile edge and bringing the handle down with steady, even pressure while supporting the machine. This ensures cleaner cuts, prevents strain on handle and helps to maintain and protect both the tiles and cutter.
description: The Faithfull 400mm Tile Cutter is a manual tile cutter, ideal for small projects when working with wall, floor and quarry tiles. With a maximum cutting capacity of 400mm square, 280mm diagonal and up to 10mm thick, it is designed to handle most common small tiling projects with ease. Featuring dual solid chromed rails and a ball-bearing sliding handle, the cutter provides smooth and accurate scoring for clean, professional-quality cuts. The durable tungsten carbide cutting wheel ensures precision and longevity, helping you achieve reliable results across multiple projects. For best results, score the tile using even forward pressure, then to snap, ensure wheel is clear of tile edge and bring handle down firmly, applying even breaking pressure by holding the handle and machine. Scoring multiple times instead of forcing the snap reduces the risk of handle strain and tile breakage. Always ensure this cutter is suited to your tile size, thickness and project you are undertaking. Larger Faithfull models are available if greater capacity and usage is required. This model is not designed for use on porcelain tiles. For harder materials, a specialist cutter is recommended. Extra features such as rubber bump stops and non-slip feet improve safety and stability, while the graduated angle guide makes angled cuts quick and simple. Compact and durable, the Faithfull 400mm Tile Cutter is the perfect tool for achieving accurate results in smaller projects; kitchens, bathrooms, walls and floors. Tile capacity: 400mm. Diagonal: 280mm. Thickness: 10mm
